name: @irisrun/subagents
description: Iris subagents — an agent (a harness session) delegates a sub-task to a child agent (its own durable session + journal). The child's final output is journaled in the parent as the delegating effect's result, so the parent replays deterministically (never re-running the child) while the child replays independently. Wires the `subagent` EffectKind via a host-side performer. Deps @irisrun/core + @irisrun/host only.
